steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice best emphasizes Atitalaquia’s size. Only one note provides a concrete measurement: Atitalaquia covers roughly 63 km².

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: discusses public services — says nothing about size. ✗
  • Choice B: compares Atitalaquia to other municipalities — no area figure given. ✗
  • Choice C: describes services provided — no mention of size. ✗
  • Choice D: directly states the 63 km² area, making size concrete and explicit. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
